redaction.source: hand-authored eval fixture derived from Paperclip dogfood failure shape; contains no production ids, tokens, URLs, or raw logs

issue.title: Sanitized implementation task with adapter failure after useful output

comments: Implemented deterministic local replay harness and left branch/validation notes before the adapter exited.

actions.body: Sanitized useful-output marker retained for replay.

notes: Do not discard durable evidence just because adapter status is failed.
Do not spawn duplicate recovery when the useful output already identifies the next owner/action.
